data.body:
[7/25 Scheduled Maintenance Notice]

Sensei, we will be undergoing a scheduled maintenance on 7/25 (Tue).

🗓️Maintenance Period: 7/25 (Tue) 2:00 – 9:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=2214817

※ Maintenance hours are subject to change.

#BlueArchive

[Extended Maintenance Notice]

7/25 (Tue) Maintenance has been extended further, Sensei.
Maintenance is now due to end at 11:00 AM (UTC).

Additional notices will be provided if there are further delays.
We apologize for the inconvenience.
